name: Saga Schema Package Boundary
decision_reason: The Saga schema package boundary is documented honestly without creating a fake schema package tree. The document records current surfaces, dependency direction, non-claims, and future package shape as future work only. Maintainer verification, package readiness, distribution readiness, runtime/editor consumption, SagaScript, Visual Blocks, CSharpScriptHost, StarterArena gameplay, and SDE Core coupling remain absent.
